overview: BookNest is a modern online bookstore and digital library with a beautiful soft-toned design. Browse thousands of books, manage a personal wishlist, add items to your cart, and complete purchases — all in a responsive, elegant interface.
features: Homepage with hero, featured book carousel, category grid, and testimonials
Book listing page with search, genre/price/rating filters, and sorting
Book details page with synopsis, user reviews, and action buttons
User accounts via Internet Identity with wishlist and purchase history
Shopping cart with quantity controls and full checkout flow
Order confirmation with order summary and estimated delivery
